title: MikroTik quickMOUNT PRO - Adjustable holder for LHG units
description: The quickMOUNT pro LHG is a advanced wall or pole mount adapter for our new LHG antennas. The quickMOUNT pro gives possibility to turn antenna within 140° both in horizontal and vertical plane. With the quickMOUNT pro it is possible to perfectly set antenna alignment using integrated graduated scale
